news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics will present at Leerink’s Global Healthcare Conference 2025 in Miami on March 10-12.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in San Diego, Capricor Therapeutics, a biotech firm traded as NASDAQ: CAPR, revealed that their management team will engage in individual investor meetings and present a company update at Leerink’s Global Healthcare Conference 2025 held in Miami, Florida from March 10-12, 2025. Capricor specializes in developing revolutionary cell and exosome-based treatments for rare diseases.

news.headline: Private employment rises by 77,000 in Feb, below forecast of 144,000. Hiring slowdown attributed to policy uncertainty and consumer spending.
news.summary: In February, private employers added 77,000 new jobs, marking the smallest increase in seven months and falling short of expectations of 140,000 new jobs. The ADP National Employment Report, released by Automatic Data Processing Inc., indicates a notable deceleration in hiring before the Bureau of Labor Statistics' upcoming non-farm payrolls report, anticipated to reveal the addition of 160,000 new jobs. ADP's chief economist, Nela Richardson, suggested that uncertainty in policy and a dip in consumer spending could have contributed to potential layoffs or a hiring slowdown during the previous month. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Economic Advisor Hassett: Measures will give the US the 3% or 4% growth we hope for.
Trump gives first speech to Congress since return to presidency, avoids mentioning fellow Republicans.
news.summary: During his recent address to a joint session of Congress, Donald Trump refrained from discussing his fellow Republicans, marking his first speech since resuming the presidency. The speech did not delve into the internal party matters, focusing on other key issues instead.

news.headline: Defense is not ESG; 12% of companies admit to "greenwashing."
US Treasury Secretary Bessent hinted at bringing BTC to the US during the White House Crypto Summit on March 7.
news.summary: During the White House Crypto Summit on March 7, Treasury Secretary Bessent indicated interest in procuring more Bitcoin.

news.headline: Summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com adds Starbucks Corporation's 2024 digital transformation strategy analysis report. Insights on tech activities, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. Specialty coffee retailer Starbucks roasts, markets, and retails coffee globally.
news.summary: Dublin-based research firm, ResearchAndMarkets.com, recently added the company profile of Starbucks Corporation 2024 to its Enterprise Tech Ecosystem Series. The report delves into Starbucks' tech ventures, highlighting its digital transformation strategies, innovation schemes, and technology projects. Starbucks Corp, a renowned specialty coffee retailer, specializes in roasting, marketing, and selling specialty coffee. The company operates through its stores and provides various coffee blends to customers. This report offers valuable insights into Starbucks' tech endeavors for interested parties.

news.headline: Orkuveitan's 2024 financial statements show 45% profit growth to ISK 9.3 billion. It proposes ISK 6.5 billion dividend.
news.summary: Orkuveitan released its 2024 consolidated financial statements, revealing promising outcomes. The Group enjoyed a significant 45% profit surge from the previous year, reaching a total of ISK 9.3 billion. A dividend suggestion of ISK 6.5 billion has been tabled. The conglomerate consists of the primary firm, Veitur, along with Orka náttúrunnar, Ljósleiðarinn, and Carbfix. Its stakeholders include the City of Reykjavík, the Municipality of Akranes, and the Municipality of Borgarbyggð.

news.headline: European Commission approves Bristol Myers' Opdivo plus Yervoy for liver cancer patients. Results show improvement in overall survival.
news.summary: The European Commission recently approved Bristol Myers Squibb & Co’s Opdivo plus Yervoy for treating adult patients with unresectable or advanced hepatocellular carcinoma. The approval was granted based on data from the CheckMate -9DW study, which demonstrated a significant improvement in overall survival with this dual immunotherapy treatment. Notably, in the trial, 85% of patients received lenvatinib while 15% were given sorafenib. The study also revealed a median overall survival of 23.7 months. This development showcases a promising option for individuals battling liver cancer.

news.headline: US Economic Advisor Hassett: No uncertainty, there's going to be some tariff.
Mexico Economy Minister Ebrard: We believe around 85-90% of trade from Mexico to the US could be eligible to fall under USMCA requirements.
Enstar's subsidiary, Cavello Bay Reinsurance Limited, receives "A" Financial Strength Rating from AM Best, outlook stable.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on March 07, 2025, Enstar Group Limited (NASDAQ: ESGR) unveiled that AM Best, a credit rating agency, has given Cavello Bay Reinsurance Limited, a subsidiary of Enstar Group Limited and notable non-life run-off consolidator and Class 3B reinsurer, a Financial Strength Rating of “A” (Excellent) and a Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating (Long-Term ICR) of “a+” (Excellent). The outlook for these Credit Ratings is stable.

news.headline: Trump: I am strongly considering banking sanctions on Russia.
Trump: I am strongly considering large scale banking sanctions, sanctions, and tariffs on Russia until ceasefire.
MAX Power Mining Corp is expanding its team for Natural Hydrogen exploration in Saskatchewan, aiming to become North American leaders.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 07, 2025, MAX Power Mining Corp. revealed significant updates regarding their Natural Hydrogen exploration and development initiatives in Saskatchewan. The company (CSE: MAXX; OTC: MAXXF; FRANKFURT: 89N) introduced key personnel to enhance their technical team, aiming to propel a pioneering program in North America. The strategic focus on Saskatchewan is supported by previous data and efforts by MAX Power, indicating transformative opportunities in this rapidly evolving field. This move signifies a pivotal step towards positioning the company at the forefront of the Natural Hydrogen sector.

news.headline: Modine sets $100M share repurchase program, showing confidence in the company's future.
news.summary: Modine, a renowned global leader in thermal management technology (NYSE: MOD), has recently demonstrated enhanced faith in its future as its Board of Directors approved a share repurchase program on March 7, 2025. This move signifies a positive outlook on the company's performance and potential.

news.headline: MIH partners with MIAX to launch Bitcoin Range Binary Options; expanding financial market offerings.
news.summary: Miami-based company MIH, a prominent player in establishing and managing regulated financial markets for various asset classes, unveiled the introduction of Bitcoin Range Binary (BTCRB) Options on its MIAX platform. The launch of BTCRB Options signifies MIH's continued focus on innovation in the industry. The development was announced on March 7, 2025.

news.headline: February jobs report reveals slight hiring before DOGE layoffs and Trump tariffs; S&P 500 futures decline slightly.
news.summary: In February, the job report revealed a slight increase in hiring, coinciding with the commencement of layoffs at DOGE and the implementation of tariffs by Trump around mid-month. The S&P 500 futures experienced a decline in response to these developments.

news.headline: Hassett: We will be increasing manufacturing employment.
Mexico's President Sheinbaum: If we don't put tariffs on what's coming from the US, the US won't put tariffs on what's coming from Mexico.
ILUMYA effective for nail psoriasis in study at 2025 AAD Conference. Significant improvement shown with no new safety signals.
news.summary: Research findings unveiled at the American Academy of Dermatology indicate substantial progress in addressing moderate-to-severe instances of nail psoriasis, with no reported safety concerns. The event, held in Princeton, N.J. on March 7, 2025, showcased data from Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, Inc., USA, which demonstrated marked enhancements in this condition. The study, presented by a subsidiary of Sun Pharmaceutical, revealed promising results in patients with moderate-to-severe nail psoriasis. This breakthrough highlights significant advancements in managing this dermatological issue, offering hope to many individuals grappling with this condition. The data underscores the potential for improved treatment options for those affected by nail psoriasis.

news.headline: Unit Corp (OTCQX: UNTC) to pay $1.25 dividend per share on March 28, 2025 to shareholders on record as of March 18.
news.summary: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) in Tulsa, Oklahoma, shared news of its upcoming quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for Q1 2025. Shareholders as of March 18, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 28, 2025. The company will use cash from its balance sheet to fund this payout. Known for its energy operations, Unit Corporation is a publicly-traded entity.

news.headline: Hassett: We will be reducing government employment and government spending.
Iran's Nour News affiliated with top security body: US Trump letter to Khamenei is a repetitive show by Washington.
Novartis shareholders approve all resolutions at 2025 AGM. 1,693 shareholders present, representing 57.42% of shares.
news.summary: In Basel on March 7, 2025, Novartis shareholders approved all proposed resolutions at the Annual General Meeting, as per the Board of Directors’ recommendations. The meeting, held in Basel, saw a turnout of 1,693 shareholders, accounting for around 57.42% of Novartis' issued shares.

news.headline: XRP trading sideways after Bitcoin reserve news, price $2.54, market cap $147.3B. Bitcoin price at $90,125.54.
news.summary: XRP, the cryptocurrency, is currently experiencing a period of stability in trading as it remains unaffected by the strategic Bitcoin reserve executive order, which has not resulted in a significant market rally as of Friday. XRP is currently priced at $2.54 with a market capitalization of $147.3 billion. In the past 24 hours, it has seen a decrease of 2.7%, but over the last seven days, it has shown a positive trend with an increase of 22.8%. In comparison, Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $90,125.54, with a market cap of $1.78 trillion, experiencing a negligible 0.01% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 10.6% increase over the week. Ethereum (ETH) is trading at $2,214.08, with a market cap of $267.01 billion. Ethereum saw a 1.9% decline in the last 24 hours but a slight 2.9% increase in the last seven days. Onchain Lens data provider highlights a notable investor who accumulated 25.12 million XRP between April and November at an average price of $0.429.

news.headline: Egypt Data Center Market valued at USD 278 million in 2024, projected to reach USD 694 million by 2030 - growing at CAGR of 16.47%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Egypt Data Center Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was worth $278 million in 2024 and is estimated to grow to $694 million by 2030, with a CAGR of 16.47%. Egypt’s data center market is emerging in Africa, attracting rising investments in recent years. This expansion is being driven by various factors.

news.headline: Harris | Oakmark's Mike Manelli retiring after 20 years of service from the Oakmark International Fund and Oakmark International Small Cap Fund by year-end 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on March 7, 2025, it was announced that Mike Manelli, a Partner and co-portfolio manager for the Oakmark International Fund and the Oakmark International Small Cap Fund, will retire at the end of 2025 after 20 years of service. Manelli will be stepping down from his role as co-portfolio manager.

news.headline: KLX Energy Services refinanced $232M senior notes, obtained $125M ABL credit facility, to hold March 14 conference call.
news.summary: KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: KLXE) has recently announced the issuance of $232 million in new senior secured notes set to mature in March 2030. Additionally, the company has secured a new $125 million asset-based lending (ABL) credit facility. In other news, KLX is scheduled to conduct its 2024 fourth quarter and year-end conference call on March 14, 2025. The company is headquartered in Houston and the recent developments reflect its continued growth and financial strategies.

news.headline: Northfield Capital Corp champions Canadian craftsmanship with Spirit of York Distillery Co., sourcing 100% local ingredients.
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, Northfield Capital Corporation (TSX-V: NFD.A) restated its dedication to Canadian industry by owning Spirit of York Distillery Co. The company sources all its ingredients from Canada, including heritage grains and water. Spirit of York is a leading Canadian spirits brand championing national pride and setting high standards for quality. Northfield Capital Corporation remains committed to supporting and promoting Canadian craftsmanship through its strategic ownership of Spirit of York.

news.headline: Candela launches Glacé™ Treatment at AAD Annual Meeting, addressing global demand for 'Glass Skin' facial.
news.summary: Candela Corporation, a prominent medical aesthetic device company based in Marlborough, MA, has introduced an advanced hydrodermabrasion solution in response to the increasing worldwide demand for 'glass skin' facials. This global launch took place on March 7, 2025. The company is renowned for its innovative technology and is aiming to capitalize on the growing trend of achieving flawless skin.

news.headline: Trump on South Africa: Any South African farmer and their family will be invited to US.
Hassett: I thought some job numbers would be lower over flu month.
Trump: We're stopping all federal funding to South Africa.
Ecopetrol releases draft on social, environmental issues for 2024, following guidelines from Superintendency of Finance.
news.summary: Colombia's Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) disclosed on March 7, 2025, that it has released the preliminary chapter regarding practices, policies, and procedures as mandated by External Circular 031 of 2021 from the Colombian Superintendency of Finance.

news.headline: P2P Group Ltd. closes first tranche of non-brokered private placement as announced earlier. (Words: 91)
news.summary: P2P Group Ltd., based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed on March 7, 2025, that it has successfully completed the initial phase of a non-brokered private placement known as the "Financing." The company, identified as CSE: PPB, sealed this transaction following its news releases on February 25 and March 6, 2025. In this regard, P2P Group Ltd. issued a specified number of shares as part of this placement.

news.headline: 11 UBS advisors in Mid-Atlantic region named to Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list for 2025.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, UBS revealed that 11 advisors from its Mid-Atlantic Wealth Management Market have been honored as part of the 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. The Mid-Atlantic market, overseen by Market Executive Brendan Graham, operates within UBS's Southeast Region led by Regional Director Julie Fox. This recognition highlights the dedication and excellence of the advisors in providing top-notch service.

news.headline: 13 UBS advisors in Florida named to 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list, led by Market Executive Lane Strumlauf.
news.summary: In Miami, UBS revealed that 13 advisors from its Florida Market have secured spots on the 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. Heading the Florida Market is Lane Strumlauf, with Julie Fox overseeing the Southeast Region. Fox expressed pride in the advisors' success, noting the significance of this industry recognition. The UBS leadership team also extended congratulations to the accomplished financial advisors in the region.

news.headline: 13 UBS advisors in South Wealth Management Market named to 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. Congratulations!
news.summary: Thirteen advisors in UBS's South Wealth Management Market have been recognized on the 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. This market, overseen by Market Executive Greg Achten, operates within UBS's Southeast Region under the direction of Regional Director Julie Fox. The advisors have been commended for their exceptional skills and are recognized nationally for their achievements. This acknowledgment highlights their unique capabilities within the wealth management sector.

news.headline: Belmont Village Senior Living celebrates Women's History Month by recognizing women in their 35 communities nationwide. Founded by Patricia Will.
news.summary: Belmont Village Senior Living, headquartered in Houston, is paying tribute to Women's History Month by acknowledging women globally, including those residing in their 35 communities across the country. These extraordinary women have defied conventions, driving transformation and opening doors for women today. Established and helmed by senior living industry pioneer Patricia Will, Belmont Village is dedicated to championing and uplifting women.

news.headline: Microsoft has begun testing out models from XAI, Meta and DeepSeek as potential OpenAI replacements in CoPilot - The Information.
Korea Zinc worried about MBK's move in Homeplus rehab, raising concerns over private equity practices. Criticism grows.
news.summary: Seoul, South Korea - Homeplus is currently in a critical stage after entering corporate rehabilitation, prompting increased scrutiny towards parent company MBK Partners and private equity firms (PEFs). Criticisms have arisen due to Korea Zinc's concerns about MBK's recent acquisition bid. The Korea Joongang Daily reports that skepticism towards MBK is escalating, potentially diminishing its standing. This situation highlights growing concerns regarding the management practices of PEFs. The outcome of these developments remains uncertain as Homeplus navigates its rehabilitation process.

news.headline: Microsoft is developing an in-house AI reasoning model to compete with OpenAI, and may sell them to developers - the Information.
Avalara wins G2's 2025 Best Accounting and Finance Products award, highlights tax compliance automation software.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Avalara, Inc., a prominent provider of tax compliance automation software for businesses, was recognized in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards. They received the award for G2's Best Accounting and Finance Products 2025. This acknowledgment highlights Avalara's position as a top choice for businesses seeking efficient tax solutions.

news.headline: Ulike showcases IPL technology advancements at 2025 AAD Annual Meeting with Dr. Adam J. Rubinstein, a laser hair treatment expert. #Orlando #IPL #AAD
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Ulike, a prominent player in the at-home IPL hair removal sector, joined forces with Dr. Adam J. Rubinstein to participate in the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting in Orlando, Florida on March 7th. Dr. Rubinstein, a respected authority in laser hair treatment, showcased his expertise at this event for the first time, highlighting the latest advances in the field. This collaboration, which marked a significant milestone for both Ulike and Dr. Rubinstein, drew attention from a wide audience at the conference.

news.headline: Pearson appoints Arden Hoffman as Non-Executive Director, effective from June 1, 2025. Hoffman brings leadership experience.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Pearson, a global company specializing in lifelong learning, revealed the addition of Arden Hoffman as an independent Non-Executive Director, effective from June 1, 2025. Arden brings extensive leadership experience to the role and has served in notable positions. Pearson's stock is listed on the FTSE under the ticker symbol PSON.L. The appointment signifies a strategic move for the company, as they continue to focus on strengthening their board with diverse talents.

news.headline: Points4Purpose, Inc. opens CommunityRewards™ to American Express® cardholders, offering cashback from 5,000+ brands.
news.summary: In Miami on March 7, 2025, Points4Purpose, Inc. revealed that American Express® cardholders now have the opportunity to participate in the CommunityRewards™ program. This allows them to receive cashback rewards from more than 5,000 top retail brands. The platform also facilitates micro-donations, where a portion of purchases can be automatically directed towards charitable causes.

news.headline: SFA-002 shows promise as psoriasis treatment, reducing skin thickening and inflammatory markers in mice. #AAD2025
news.summary: Mice that received SFA-002 showed a decrease in psoriasis disease severity and a more significant reduction in skin thickening when compared to etanercept and apremilast in a study conducted. SFA-002 also lowered key inflammatory markers and minimized skin damage at levels similar to betamethasone and apremilast.

news.headline: Mexico's Economy Min. Ebrard: US tariffs on steel and aluminum are not justified.
Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL) to host Investor Day on March 10, 2025, with executive team updates. Webcast available.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL), a premier digital analytics platform, has scheduled its investor day for Monday, March 10, 2025, starting at 2:30 PM ET. The event will showcase presentations from the Amplitude executive team, offering insights into the company’s strategy, product roadmap, go-to-market approach, and financial updates. The webcast of the event can be accessed through the Investor Relations section of Amplitude’s website at investors.amplitude.com.
